summary: The issue was that the `/status` handler assumed the `Metrics` configuration was always present when `enable_metrics` was true, but `cfg.Metrics` could be nil. I added a nil check before accessing `cfg.Metrics.Endpoint` and `cfg.Metrics.IntervalSec`, returning `metrics: nil` when the config is missing. After updating `main.go` and running `gofmt`, `./test.sh` now passes successfully, indicating the handler no longer panics.
